title: LOC Sync Manifest
description: Tracks sync freshness between lib/loc-app services and src/pages/template/loc/ pages

locAppRepo.description: Relative path to the loc-app repository root from aegis-lab root

entries.description: Map of template file path (relative to src/pages/template/loc/) to sync metadata

locPagePath.description: Path to the primary source directory relative to services/{service}/src/. May point to a page (e.g. 'pages/index'), a router entry point (e.g. 'router'), or a parts directory (e.g. 'parts/common/LegalonAssistant').

locPartsGlobs.description: Glob patterns for related parts, relative to services/{service}/src/

lastSyncedCommit.description: Full SHA of the loc-app commit this template was last synced from

lastSyncedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the sync was performed

templateRoute.description: Browser route for this template page (e.g. '/template/loc/case')

referenceScreenshot.description: Filename in .reference-screenshots/ directory, or null if not set
